title: Modules
description: Deep-dives into the Tish ecosystem packages: Lattish (UI), tish-tailwind (CSS), tish-browser-server (in-browser shims), tish-creator (TishDoc markdown), tish-ide-panels (editor + runner).

chapters.title: JSX and the h runtime
chapters.summary: How JSX lowers to a tree of vnodes.

chapters.title: useState and useRef
chapters.summary: Reactive state, mutable handles, the hook-order rule.

chapters.title: Lattish + HTML + CSS
chapters.summary: Choosing the right element; the four ways to apply styles.

chapters.title: Utilities and tw()
chapters.summary: Atomic CSS classes; the tw() helper.

chapters.title: Emit and build
chapters.summary: Source scanner; integrating into your build.

chapters.title: serve() via Service Worker
chapters.summary: Build a real REST API in a browser tab.

chapters.title: Editor and runner
chapters.summary: EditorPanel, MiniRunner, runVm; build a REPL in 40 lines.
